'''''Star Wars'' 97''' is the ninety-seventh issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Publisher's summary==
''Luke, Kiro and Dani the Zeltron must fight alone against an army of Nagai invading a remote planet! This issue, a major character dies—could it be Luke's last stand? "Escape" is written by Jo Duffy and penciled by Cynthia Martin''.<ref name="ma" />
